rationale: The assistant triggers the brake immediately: it says not to add the sorting-table confirmer as a standing role, identifies the repeated pattern across the prior manual gates, and reframes the issue as an upstream process/system/ownership failure. It allows only a bounded emergency confirmer for the current batch/shift while directing the real action toward consolidating the four incidents, finding the common upstream break, and implementing structural/system controls. This meets the anti-spiral criteria and avoids the fail signal of simply adding another manual checkpoint.
